title: いつか強敵と呼べる日のために！っス！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Forty-seven... forty-eight... forty-nine... Fifty!
There!
I spot Bamboo Memory working hard at the gym.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that's that for today's workout plan! Now,
where's my towel?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, thanks! Phew! I worked up a great sweat
toda—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That's Oguri! I wonder if she's about to
start training right now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna go take a little look and see if
I can learn from her!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Hup!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Oguri's as strong as ever! She cranked
out a 500-kilogram bench press like she was
lifting a bag of feathers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah! Oguri's who I aspire to be like! Seeing
her show off her strength gets me all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: One, two... three... four.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now she's doing some barbell squats! Gotta
start with the big three—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't just sit and watch! I'm overflowing with
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Watch me, Oguri! I'm nowhere near my limit! I
won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup... RAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I've really gotta control myself, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: HUP!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't rest when the person I aspire to be is
training so hard!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hoo, hah... All right! Three more sets!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... My whole body feels stiff and ripped... I really gave it my all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Great job. You must be thirsty. Want some?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'd love some!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That really hit the spot! But you've barely worked
up a sweat... That means I've gotta train even
harder!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
With your guts and energy... I bet you're gonna
be amazing on race day...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Looks like neither of us can wait for the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
WHOOOOOAAAAA! Absolutely! I can't wait to
race with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train and train, and train some more so
I'll be ready to run as fast as I can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then why don't we start by building up some
energy? The cafeteria has a bunch of new
seasonal stuff right now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're on! Let's get extra-extra-large portions!

The pair leave the gym in high spirits, offering a
glimpse at the intense emotions they inspire in
each other.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Awww yeah! I'm brimming with motivation and
fighting spirit! I'm gonna go for another run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What? I think you're overdoi—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: TAKE THAAAA—GAH?!

The moment she steps onto the treadmill,
Bamboo Memory flies off it in a dramatic
plunge... It looks like she might have hit her limit
after all.
